mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_lorebook_entry WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY constant_injection DESC, priority DESC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM app_lorebook_entry WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_lorebook_entry SET character_id = #{characterId}, keywords_csv = #{keywordsCsv}, content = #{content}, priority = #{priority}, constant_injection = #{constantInjection}, scan_depth = #{scanDepth}, enabled = #{enabled}, source_type = COALESCE(#{source}, source_type), raw_entry_json = COALESCE(#{rawEntryJson}, raw_entry_json), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE app_lorebook_entry SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}
